α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R b s ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  let S : Set (α × ℕ) := {p | p.1 = a}
  let T : Set (α × ℕ) := {p | p.1 = b}
  have h_disj : Disjoint S T := by
    rw [Set.disjoint_left]
    rintro p ha hb
    simp only [S, T, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at ha hb
    rw [ha] at hb
    exact hab hb
  refine (h_indep.indep_generate_from_disjoint h_disj).indepFun ?_ ?_
  all_goals
    refine Measurable.of_comap_le_le _ (fun s ↦ ?_)
    by_cases hs : s = 0
    · simp [hs, rewardByCount_eq_zero]
      exact measurable_const.comap_le
    · have : s = (s - 1) + 1 := by rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hs)]
      rw [this]
      apply (MeasurableSpace.le_generate_from ⟨_, rfl⟩).trans
      apply MeasurableSpace.generate_from_mono
      simp [S, T]

  have h_eq (x : α) : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R x s ω) =

    ext ω n; cases n <;> simp [f, rewardByCount_eq_zero]
  rw [h_eq a, h_eq b]
  refine (identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all h).symm.indepFun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) ?_
  exact iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (i := a) (j := b) hab (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure_all ν)

  let T : Set (α × ℕ) := {p | p.1 = b}

    rintro ⟨x, n⟩ ⟨hxa, hxb⟩
    exact hab (hxa.trans hxb.symm)
  refine Indep.of_measurable ?_ ?_ _ (iIndep.indep_iSup_of_disjoint h_indep h_disj)
  all_goals

    intro n
    cases n with
    | zero => exact measurable_const.mono (by simp)
    | succ n =>
      refine Measurable.of_comap_le (le_iSup_of_le (_, n) (le_iSup_of_le ?_ le_rfl))
      simp

  have h_sigma := h_indep.iIndep_measurableSpace
  let Sa := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = a}

    rintro ⟨rfl, rfl⟩

    | coe n =>

      refine le_biSup_of_le (a, n) ?_ le_rfl

  · rw [measurable_pi_iff]
    intro n
    cases n with
    | zero =>

have h_ind := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_independent_biSup_measurableSpace] at h_ind
  let Sa := {a} ×ˢ (Set.univ : Set ℕ)
  let Sb := {b} ×ˢ (Set.univ : Set ℕ)
  have h_disj : Disjoint Sa Sb := by
    rw [Set.disjoint_prod]
    left; exact Set.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hab
  specialize h_ind Sa Sb h_disj
  refine IndepFun.of_measurable_space h_ind ?_ ?_
  · refine measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun s ↦ ?_)
    by_cases hs : s = 0
    · simp only [hs]; exact measurable_const.measurable_of_le (OrderBot.bot_le _)
    · have : (a, s - 1) ∈ Sa := by simp
      refine Measurable.mono (MeasurableSpace.le_biSup _ this) ?_
      rw [MeasurableSpace.comap_le_iff_measurable]
      convert measurable_id
      ext ω; congr; exact (Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hs)).symm
  · refine measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun s ↦ ?_)
    by_cases hs : s = 0
    · simp only [hs]; exact measurable_const.measurable_of_le (OrderBot.bot_le _)
    · have : (b, s - 1) ∈ Sb := by simp
      refine Measurable.mono (MeasurableSpace.le_biSup _ this) ?_
      rw [MeasurableSpace.comap_le_iff_measurable]
      convert measurable_id
      ext ω; congr; exact (Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hs)).symm

  let f := fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1)
  have h_indep : iIndepFun f 𝔓' := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  refine iIndepFun.indep_supr_on_disjoint h_indep (s := {p | p.1 = a}) (t := {p | p.1 = b}) ?_ ?_ ?_
  · exact Set.disjoint_left.mpr (fun p h1 h2 ↦ hab (h1.symm.trans h2))
  · refine le_antisymm (iSup_le fun i ↦ ?) (iSup_le fun k ↦ le_iSup_of_le (a, k) (le_iSup_of_le rfl le_rfl))
    cases i
    · simp; exact bot_le
    · exact le_iSup_of_le (a, _) (le_iSup_of_le rfl le_rfl)
  · refine le_antisymm (iSup_le fun i ↦ ?) (iSup_le fun k ↦ le_iSup_of_le (b, k) (le_iSup_of_le rfl le_rfl))
    cases i
    · simp; exact bot_le
    · exact le_iSup_of_le (b, _) (le_iSup_of_le rfl le_rfl)

have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  let S : Bool → Set (α × ℕ) := fun c ↦ if c then {a} ×ˢ Set.univ else {b} ×ˢ Set.univ
  have h_disj : Pairwise (Disjoint on S) := by
    intro x y hxy
    cases x <;> cases y <;> try contradiction
    · exact Set.disjoint_prod_left.mpr (Set.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hab)
    · exact Set.disjoint_prod_left.mpr (Set.disjoint_singleton_left.mpr (Ne.symm hab))
  have h_sigma := h_indep.independent_supr_of_disjoint S h_disj
  refine IndepFun.of_measurable (h_sigma true false (by simp)) ?_ ?_
  · rw [MeasurableSpace.pi, MeasurableSpace.comap_iSup]
    refine iSup_le (fun n ↦ ?_)
    cases n with
    | zero => simp; exact bot_le
    | succ n => refine le_trans ?_ (le_iSup₂ (a, n) (by simp [S])); rfl
  · rw [MeasurableSpace.pi, MeasurableSpace.comap_iSup]
    refine iSup_le (fun n ↦ ?_)
    cases n with
    | zero => simp; exact bot_le
    | succ n => refine le_trans ?_ (le_iSup₂ (b, n) (by simp [S])); rfl

-- We map the problem to the stream measure where actions correspond to independent dimensions.
  have h_ident := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all h
  -- Define the transformation that recovers the reward sequence from the joint process
  let φ (x : α) (f : α × ℕ → ℝ) (n : ℕ) : ℝ := if n = 0 then 0 else f (x, n - 1)
  have h_meas (x : α) : Measurable (φ x) := measurable_pi_lambda _ fun n ↦ by
    by_cases hn : n = 0 <;> simp [hn, φ] <;> fun_prop
  -- Use the IdentDistrib property
  refine (IdentDistrib.indepFun_iff (h_ident.comp (h_meas a) (h_meas b)) (h_meas a) (h_meas b)).mpr ?_
  -- Now prove independence in the stream measure
  -- The variables are Y_a = φ a (fun p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) and Y_b = φ b (fun p ↦ ω p.2 p.1)
  -- Y_a depends only on {ω | ∃ n, p = (n, a)}, Y_b on {ω | ∃ n, p = (n, b)}.
  -- Since a ≠ b, these are disjoint sets of coordinates in a product measure.
  rw [Bandit.streamMeasure]
  -- We rely on the fact that for a product measure, variables depending on disjoint coordinates are independent.
  -- This is equivalent to iIndepFun of the action processes.
  have h_indep_actions : iIndepFun (fun x ω n ↦ ω n x) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) := by
    rw [Measure.infinitePi_pi_congr_left] -- Reorder to product over α
    exact iIndepFun_pi_infinitePi _ -- Independent components
  exact (iIndepFun.indepFun_iff h_indep_actions a b hab).comp (h_meas a) (h_meas b)

have H := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all h
  let F (c : α) (u : α × ℕ → ℝ) (s : ℕ) : ℝ := if s = 0 then 0 else u (c, s - 1)
  refine (H.comp (F a) (F b)).indepFun ?_
  rw [Bandit.streamMeasure]
  have h_indep : iIndepFun (fun c ω n ↦ ω n c) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) := by
    rw [Measure.infinitePi_pi_comm]
    exact iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun c ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν)
  exact (h_indep.indepFun a b hab).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

have h_ident := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all h
  let F (x : α) (ω : α × ℕ → ℝ) (s : ℕ) := ω (x, s)
  let G (x : α) (ω : ℕ → α → ℝ) (s : ℕ) := ω s x
  have h_indep : IndepFun (G a) (G b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    rw [Bandit.streamMeasure]
    exact Measure.indepFun_infinitePi_pi_of_ne (fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) (fun _ ↦ ν) hab
  exact (h_ident.comp_prod_mk (fun ω ↦ F a ω) (fun ω ↦ F b ω)).indepFun_iff.mpr h_indep

have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_iIndep] at h_indep
  let f : α × ℕ → Ω → ℝ := fun p ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1)
  let Sa := ⨆ n, MeasurableSpace.comap (f (a, n)) inferInstance
  let Sb := ⨆ n, MeasurableSpace.comap (f (b, n)) inferInstance
  have h_indep_ab : Indep Sa Sb 𝔓' := by
    convert iIndep.indep_iSup_of_disjoint h_indep (Set.range fun n ↦ (a, n))
      (Set.range fun n ↦ (b, n)) ?_
    · rw [iSup_range]
    · rw [iSup_range]
    · rintro _ _ ⟨n, rfl⟩ ⟨m, rfl⟩
      injections
      contradiction
  refine IndepFun.comp ?_ ?_ h_indep_ab
  · refine measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ ?_
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp only [rewardByCount, Finset.range_zero, Finset.filter_empty, Finset.sum_empty]
      exact measurable_const
    | succ n => exact Measurable.le (MeasurableSpace.le_iSup _ n) measurable_id
  · refine measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ ?_
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp only [rewardByCount, Finset.range_zero, Finset.filter_empty, Finset.sum_empty]
      exact measurable_const
    | succ n => exact Measurable.le (MeasurableSpace.le_iSup _ n) measurable_id

have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_iIndep_comap_measurable] at h_indep
  let S (u : α) := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = u}
  have h_disj : Disjoint (S a) (S b) := by
    simp only [Set.disjoint_left, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    exact fun _ ha hb ↦ hab (ha.trans hb.symm)
  refine Indep.comp (iIndepSets.indep_iSup_of_disjoint h_indep h_disj) ?_ ?_
  all_goals
    simp only [measurable_pi_iff]
    intro n
    cases n with
    | zero => simp only [rewardByCount_zero, measurable_const]
    | succ n =>
      apply Measurable.mono (measurable_iff_comap_le.mpr le_rfl)
      refine le_trans ?_ (MeasurableSpace.le_iSup _ (by simp [S]))
      exact MeasurableSpace.le_iSup _ _

have h_ident := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all h
  let F (c : α) (f : α × ℕ → ℝ) (s : ℕ) : ℝ := if s = 0 then 0 else f (c, s - 1)
  have hF (c : α) : Measurable (F c) := Measurable.pi_iff.2 fun s ↦ by
    by_cases hs : s = 0 <;> simp [hs, F]; exact measurable_pi_apply _
  refine h_ident.indepFun (hF a).aemeasurable (hF b).aemeasurable ?_
  rw [Bandit.streamMeasure, Measure.infinitePi_infinitePi_eq_infinitePi_prod]
  refine (iIndepFun_infinitePi_apply _).indepFun_comp ?_
  rw [Set.disjoint_iff_forall_ne]
  rintro ⟨n, x⟩ hx ⟨m, y⟩ hy
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx hy
  simp [hx, hy, hab.symm]

have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  let F (c : α) (x : α × ℕ → ℝ) (n : ℕ) : ℝ := if n = 0 then 0 else x (c, n - 1)
  have h_eq (c : α) : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R c s ω) = F c ∘ (fun ω p ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω) := by
    ext ω n; cases n <;> simp [F, rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe, rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top]
  rw [h_eq a, h_eq b]
  refine IndepFun.comp ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  refine iIndepFun.indepFun_comap_on_disjoint_sets h_indep {p | p.1 = a} {p | p.1 = b} ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  simp [Set.disjoint_iff]; intro x hx hy; rw [hx] at hy; exact hab hy

refine iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h) (fun n ↦ (a, n + 1))
    (fun n ↦ (b, n + 1)) ?_ ?_ ?_
  · fun_prop
  · fun_prop
  · exact fun _ _ h ↦ hab (Prod.mk.inj h).1

have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_iIndep] at h_indep
  let S := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = a}
  let T := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = b}
  have h_disj : Disjoint S T := by
    rw [Set.disjoint_left]
    intro p hpa hpb
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hpa hpb
    subst hpa hpb
    exact hab rfl
  have h_Indep := iIndep.Indep_iSup_of_disjoint h_indep h_disj
  refine Indep.indepFun_of_measurable h_Indep ?_ ?_
  · rw [measurable_pi_iff]
    intro n
    cases n with
    | zero => exact measurable_const
    | succ n =>
      refine Measurable.of_comap_le (le_iSup_of_le (a, n) (le_iSup_of_le rfl le_rfl))
  · rw [measurable_pi_iff]
    intro n
    cases n with
    | zero => exact measurable_const
    | succ n =>
      refine Measurable.of_comap_le (le_iSup_of_le (b, n) (le_iSup_of_le rfl le_rfl))

have H := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_iIndep] at H
  rw [IndepFun_iff_Indep]
  have h_le (c : α) : MeasurableSpace.comap (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount A R c s ω) 𝔓'.toMeasurableSpace ≤
      ⨆ n, MeasurableSpace.comap (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R c (n + 1) ω) 𝔓'.toMeasurableSpace := by
    rw [MeasurableSpace.comap_pi]
    refine iSup_le fun s ↦ ?_
    cases s with
    | zero =>
      simp only [Nat.zero_eq]
      try simp [rewardByCount]
      rw [MeasurableSpace.comap_const]
      exact bot_le
    | succ n => exact le_iSup _ n
  refine Indep.mono ?_ (h_le a) (h_le b)
  refine iIndep.indep_iSup_of_disjoint H (by simp [hab]) (by simp [hab.symm]) ?_
  simp only [Set.disjoint_iff, Set.mem_prod, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_univ, and_true]
  rintro p ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  exact hab rfl

have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  rw [IndepFun_iff_Indep, ← iIndepFun_iff_iIndep] at h_indep ⊢
  let S : Bool → Set (α × ℕ) := fun x ↦ if x then {p | p.1 = a} else {p | p.1 = b}
  have h_disj : Pairwise (Disjoint on S) := by
    intro i j hij
    simp only [S, ne_eq, hij, not_false_eq_true, if_true, if_false]
    rw [Set.disjoint_left]
    intro p hp hq
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hp hq
    rw [hp] at hq
    exact hab hq
  have h := iIndep.indep_iSup_of_disjoint h_indep S h_disj
  convert h using 1
  all_goals {
    simp only [S, if_true, if_false]
    rw [MeasurableSpace.comap_pi_equiv_iSup]
    congr
    ext p
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_range]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨n, rfl⟩
      cases n with
      | zero =>
        use 0
        simp only [rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_zero] -- assuming 0 at 0 implies const
        apply MeasurableSpace.comap_const
      | succ n =>
        use n; rfl
    · rintro ⟨n, rfl⟩
      use n + 1
  }

have := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  let π (c : α) (u : α × ℕ → ℝ) (n : ℕ) : ℝ := if n = 0 then 0 else u (c, n - 1)
  have hπ (c : α) : Measurable (π c) := measurable_pi_lambda _ fun n ↦ by
    dsimp; split; exact measurable_const; exact measurable_pi_apply _
  refine (this.indepFun_comp (hπ a) (hπ b) ?_).2
  intro p hp q hq
  simp [π, Set.mem_range] at hp hq
  rcases hp with ⟨n, _, rfl⟩
  rcases hq with ⟨m, _, rfl⟩
  simp only [Prod.mk.injEq]
  rintro ⟨rfl, _⟩
  exact hab rfl

let g : ℕ ⊕ ℕ → α × ℕ := Sum.elim (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n))
  have hg : Function.Injective g := by
    intro x y h
    cases x <;> cases y <;> simp [g] at h
    · exact h
    · exact (hab h.1).elim
    · exact (hab h.1.symm).elim
    · exact h
  have h_indep := (iIndepFun_rewardByCount h).comp g hg
  rw [iIndepFun_sum_iff] at h_indep
  let Φ : (ℕ → ℝ) → (ℕ → ℝ) := fun f n ↦ match n with | 0 => 0 | n+1 => f n
  have hΦ : Measurable Φ := measurable_pi_lambda _ fun i ↦ by
    cases i <;> simp [Φ] <;> fun_prop
  convert h_indep.2.2.comp hΦ hΦ using 1 <;> ext ω n
  · cases n <;> simp [Φ]; rfl
  · cases n <;> simp [Φ]; rfl
